text:
sanction, penalty or other mean of enforcement used to provide incentives for obedience with the law, also known as penal sanction, penalty. Attributes include: 
- part of: "legal norm",
 "Boycott, Divestment and Sanctions (together with: boycott, divestment)"
- instance of: "legal term or legal concept"
- described by source: "Gujin Tushu Jicheng"
- different from: "consent"
- subclass of: "punishment"
- Commons category: "Sanctions"
- opposite of: "bounty"
